changes: Choice to either have locked options visible and greyed out with a lock icon, or completely hidden overall.
New Management UI to control vehicles checked out, allowing members or staff (if restricted) to reset the count of the garage system in case vehicles are /dv or lost in server wipes.
Comes with either a tab within the UI itself or as a command /vms
New check-in function for users to return their vehicle either using the main dashboard or using the command /myvehicle
